summary: Iteration 331 - Tested category configuration enhancements (category_type, requires_site_visit, installment_payments, related_services, subcategories). Backend API tests all passed (10/10). Fixed critical bug in CategoryConfigRow save function that was not sending new fields to backend.

integration_issues.issue: FIXED - Save function was not sending new fields (category_type, requires_site_visit, site_visit_optional, installment_payments, installment_split, related_services, subcategories) to backend API

All new fields (category_type, requires_site_visit, site_visit_optional, installment_payments, installment_split, related_services, subcategories) now properly sent to backend API.

bug_fixed.description: CategoryConfigRow save function was not sending new fields to backend
